embeddingText: Textilvarutillverkning, tillverkare av textila produkter, produktområden, material, sömnad, produktion, specialanpassning, serietillverkning, företagsfakta, referenser, kontakt och offertförfrågan.
llmClassificationHints: Use this scaffold when the business manufactures textile goods rather than primarily selling finished retail products online.
Prefer this scaffold when product categories, production methods, materials or customization are central to the business.
Do not choose this scaffold for pure textile retail, fashion ecommerce or tailoring-only service businesses unless manufacturing is the core identity.
